zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD整体处于窄幅震荡偏弱格局，价格围绕1710附近徘徊，短线缺乏明确方向。均线系统显示价格持续运行在20日均线1720下方，说明中期动能仍偏空。尽管波动幅度收窄，但多头未能有效突破关键阻力，市场情绪偏谨慎，资金以观望为主，整体结构仍偏整理状态运行。

技术指标方面，MACD值为负且持续扩散，表明空头动能仍占优势，但下行动能并未明显放大，属于弱势整理阶段。RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限，但结合价格结构来看并未出现明显超卖反弹信号。均线压制明显，短期反弹多次受阻，显示上方抛压依旧存在，反弹持续性不足。

支撑位关注1709一线短期低点，若跌破可能进一步下探1700整数关口。上方阻力集中在1712近期高点以及1720均线区域，该区域构成关键压力带。若无法有效突破1720，则行情大概率维持箱体震荡，反之突破则有望打开短线反弹空间，形成阶段性转强结构。

交易策略上建议保持谨慎偏空思路为主，激进者可在1710上方轻仓试空，止损放在1720上方确认突破失效。稳健者可等待价格明确跌破1709后顺势跟空，目标看向1700及下方支撑区域。若出现放量突破1720，则需及时调整为空头思路，避免逆势操作带来风险，当前更适合短线区间交易。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently moving within a tight consolidation phase around 1710, showing limited directional conviction after a very muted 24-hour change. Price action remains slightly tilted to the downside as it trades below the 20-period SMA at 1720.9, which is now acting as a dynamic resistance level. The structure reflects a compressed range environment where volatility is low and participants appear hesitant to commit before a clearer directional breakout emerges.

Momentum indicators lean cautiously bearish. The MACD reading at -12.76 signals weakening upside momentum and suggests that recent upward attempts have failed to generate sustained follow-through. Although RSI is not provided, price behavior alone implies neutral-to-slightly-weak conditions, especially given repeated inability to reclaim the short-term moving average. Overall, momentum remains flat to negative, with no strong divergence suggesting a reversal yet.

Key support is established near the psychological 1700 level, which has repeatedly contained downside movement and is becoming an important short-term floor. A sustained break below this level could expose ETH to further downside pressure toward 1680 and potentially 1665. On the upside, immediate resistance is located at 1720–1725, closely aligned with the SMA20, followed by a more significant barrier around 1750 where prior rejection zones may attract selling interest.

From a trading perspective, conditions favor range-bound strategies over trend-following setups. Buying near 1700 with tight risk controls below 1695 may offer favorable risk-reward if support continues to hold. Conversely, short positions are more attractive on failed breakouts or rejection near 1720–1725. A confirmed breakout above 1725 would be required to shift bias more constructively bullish, potentially opening a path toward 1750 and improving short-term structure.
